ggsegShen 1.0.0

Shen 268 Cortical Parcellation

Source: R/data.R
shen268_cortical.Rd

Cortical regions from the Shen 268-node functional parcellation (Shen et al., 2013). Contains 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

shen268_cortical()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Shen X et al. (2013). Groupwise whole-brain parcellation from resting-state fMRI data for network node identification. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2013.05.081

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: shen268_subcortical()

Examples

shen268_cortical()
#> Error in shen268_cortical(): object '.shen268_cortical' not found
